Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: neckwear [300209284], accessories by location above the waist [300211602], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: costume components [300212998], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Shaped articles worn at the neckline of a garment, either separate or attached.
Artículo utilizado en el escote de una prenda, tanto separada como unida.
Gevormde kledingonderdelen die afzonderlijk of aan de kleding vast rond de halslijn van een kledingstuk worden gedragen.
Geformtes Zubehör, das am Ausschnitt eines Kleidungsstücks getragen wird; entweder seperat oder am Kleidungsstück befestigt.
穿戴於衣物領口上的造型物件，可與衣物一體成形或為獨立分開的物件。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000010911/Detroit Art Registration and Information System Glossary (1980)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.; collars
